title: Chuusotsu! 1st Graduation: Time After Time
notes: Crashes as soon as you open the game.
Fullscreen crashes the game and opening doesn't work. Everything else works fine.
title: Chuusotsu! 1st Graduation: Time After Time

notes: Changing the resolution to full screen mode causes the game to show a black screen and freeze. Also, keeping the game in window mode, but clicking the maximize window button will cause the right side of the game to glitch. The whole window will also move up and down and the game becomes very slow like the FPS dropped or something. It's unplayable unless you keep it in window mode and don't maximize the window. Other then that, the game appears to run fine.
